booking_error_state_default: This booking page is not available.

booking_embed_confirm_by_email: Pick a date and we’ll confirm by email.

booking_embed_status_success: Booking request sent! Check your email.
booking_wizard_subtitle: Tell us about the property and pick a time that works.
booking_privacy_shared_notice: Your information is shared with {name} to schedule your inspection.
booking_step_services_subtitle: Choose one or more inspections for this visit.
booking_step_schedule_subtitle: Pick a date and time window that works.
booking_schedule_sms_optin: Text me appointment & report updates from {company}. By checking this box you agree to receive automated text messages from {company} about your inspection. Message frequency varies by your inspection activity. Message & data rates may apply; reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of booking.
booking_step_yourinfo_subtitle: How do we reach you with the report?
